entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop, Cajanus cajan L., screened for resistance to diseases.

entities.name: FUSARIUM WILT
entities.description: A soil-borne fungal disease affecting pigeonpea.

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a genotype to withstand or recover from disease incidence.

entities.name: ROOT DIP TECHNIQUE
entities.description: A screening method used to evaluate resistance to Fusarium wilt.

entities.name: LEAF STAPLING METHOD
entities.description: A screening method used to evaluate resistance to sterility mosaic disease.

entities.name: ICPL 15023
entities.description: A pigeonpea genotype showing combined resistance to Fusarium wilt and sterility mosaic disease.

entities.name: HYBRIDIZATION PROGRAMS
